_comment: Single source of truth for hypothesis status. config.yaml engines.enabled.* must never be set to true for an engine whose backing hypothesis here is not PASSED. Updated only by experiment scripts via _save_result(), or manually with extreme care.

H001.title: Liquidity sweep + HTF trend alignment improves directional edge over baseline structural bias
H001.tested_on: real:EURUSD_M1_2026-03-16_2026-06-19.csv (resampled M15/H4), sample_size=225, sweep_win_rate=0.4978, baseline_win_rate=0.5143, p_value=0.6251

H002.title: Qualified liquidity sweep (min ATR size + trending regime) improves win rate over H001
H002.notes: Builds on H001 failure — adds ATR size filter (>=1x ATR14) and regime filter (TRENDING only). Pre-registered min_sample=30, min_improvement=5pp. Ready to run on existing EURUSD M1 dataset.
